title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
